posts.text: It’s not controversial—it’s common sense. Protect American votes. Protect the Republic.
American votes matter. They should not be undermined by non-citizens who have no business registering or voting in our elections.

The Trump administration’s foreign policy mission is spot on: peace through strength. Our 2026 Index of U.S. Military Strength provides the most accurate analysis of our military capabilities, as well as the policies necessary to meet America’s national security interests. Read it here: heritage.org/military

Video

Journey through the past with this Heritage Guide to Historic Sites–inspired list of drinking sites!

@DailySignal  dailysignal.com/2026/03/17/t…

Be proud of your heritage. 🇺🇸
